channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Novak Djokovic posts image of MRI showing hamstring injury after fans boo him for leaving match
item.description: Novak Djokovic posted a scan of his injured left hamstring on social media early Sunday, more than 24 hours after being booed at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills offensive coordinator Joe Brady withdraws as Saints head coaching candidate: report
item.description: Despite already meeting with New Orleans Saints brass for an initial interview, Buffalo Bills assistant coach Joe Brady has declined a follow-up conversation with the franchise.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot Saturday, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather at Torrey Pines.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Avs GM MacFarland felt 'timing was right' to deal star forward Mikko Rantanen
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Facing the prospect of Mikko Rantanen becoming an unrestricted free agent after this season, Colorado general manager Chris MacFarland felt the timing was right to trade the star forward and bolster the Avalanche's roster for the future.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Riley Gaines tears into WNBA star, who gave Caitlin Clark black eye, for wearing anti-Trump shirt
item.description: Podcast host Riley Gaines jumped in on the backlash against WNBA player DiJonai Carrington after Carrington wore an anti-Trump shirt Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Bregman's door to re-sign with Astros is 'cracked' open, general manager says
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The door to re-signing free agent Alex Bregman is “cracked” open for Houston, but keeping the third baseman with the Astros might still be a long shot, general manager Dana Brown said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Padres announce 2025 theme game schedule and giveaways
item.description: The San Diego Padres have unveiled their 2025 promotional schedule, featuring a variety of exciting giveaways, theme games and fan events throughout the season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt fans storm court again as Commodores beat No. 9 Kentucky 74-69
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tyler Nickel's 3-pointer with 1:50 left put Vanderbilt ahead to stay as the Commodores upset a Top 10 team on their home court for a second straight Saturday by beating No. 9 Kentucky 74-69.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: Denver Broncos assistant general manager Darren Mougey agreed to terms with the Jets to become their GM.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Czech Olympic skier in medically induced coma following brain surgery after downhill fall in Germany
item.description: Tereza Nova, a veteran skier from Czechia, was placed in a medically induced coma after needing brain surgery to reduce swelling following a downhill crash in Germany.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaguars' Liam Coen texted Baker Mayfield he was staying with Bucs before taking head coaching job: report
item.description: New Jacksonville Jaguars head coach Liam Coen texted Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield that he was staying with the Bucs before he took the Jaguars head coaching job, according to ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: With an eye on 2026 draft, touted prospect AJ Dybantsa watches Spurs-Pacers in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — A.J. Dybantsa gets recognized at NBA games now. It makes what might be coming his way in 18 months or so seem a little more real. Dybantsa — the BYU-bound phenom who could be the No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Carroll going to Raiders, Schottenheimer promoted at Cowboys, Coen to Jags, 1 opening remains
item.description: Pete Carroll is set to return to the sideline as a head coach following a one-year hiatus and Brian Schottenheimer and Liam Coen are ready for their first shots at running an NFL team.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American Madison Keys wins Australian Open, upsets No. 1-ranked Aryna Sabalenka
item.description: American tennis player Madison Keys won the Australian Open on Saturday, defeating No. 1 ranked Aryna Sabalenka in tightly contested sets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep roundup: Alec Blair returns, leads De La Salle over Amador Valley; Oakland Tech girls rout Oakland
item.description: Bellarmine stuns St. Ignatius. San Ramon Valley’s offense explodes against California. The King’s Academy edges Sacred Heart Prep. Acalanes, Mity, SRV girls win league games.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Commanders' success product of change in ownership, NFL legend Champ Bailey says
item.description: Former Washington Redskins star Champ Bailey talked to Fox News Digital about the Commanders' success this season and pointed to ownership.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Whirlwind at Farmers Insurance Open; Wind Delay at Round 2
item.description: Another day spent at Torrey Pines, but it was not a quiet day by any means.. This course is already a difficult in itself, but try adding Santa Ana winds that gust up to 35 miles per hour? The gusts dealing the day an hour and a half suspension..
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina gets another big win against No. 5 LSU to continue SEC domination
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina showed once more who’s in charge of the Southeastern Conference. The No. 2 Gamecocks (19-1, 7-0 SEC) got 14 points from Joyce Edwards and used their trademark lockdown defense to end No. 5 LSU’s perfect start to the season with a 66-56 victory on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Las Vegas Raiders agree to hire 73-year-old Pete Carroll as their head coach, AP source says
item.description: Pete Carroll has a youthful energy that many people half his age don't possess, and the Raiders hope that enthusiasm — and, more importantly, his proven track record — translates to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tanner Scott's $72 million, 4-year contract with Dodgers includes $21 million in deferred money
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Reliever Tanner Scott's $72 million, four-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers includes $21 million in deferred salaries. Scott receives a $20 million signing bonus as part of the agreement announced Thursday, payable in four equal installments each Feb. 1 from 2025-28.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles 11-year-old pulls one-of-a-kind baseball card
item.description: An 11-year-old baseball card collector from Los Angeles just pulled what is likely the most important card they will ever pull. Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed Tuesday morning that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked. The card features the patch that the 2023 No.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah closes homestand strong with 5-2 win over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After a slow start to their season-long 7-game homestand, the Utah Hockey Club finished it strong. Barrett Hayton scored and had two assists, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Winnipeg Jets 5-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Comeback attempt falls short, Rams lose to Eagles in NFL Divisional Round
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for touchdown runs of 78 and 62 yards and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Philadelphia Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Los Angeles Rams 28-22 on Sunday to advance to the NFC championsh
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Turnovers and depleted defense contribute to top-seeded Lions' quick playoff exit
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions had everything set up the way they wanted this time. After losing last season's NFC Championship Game at San Francisco, they went 15-2 to earn the NFC's top seed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Stephen Curry considered day to day after injuring left ankle in win over Wizards
item.description: Stephen Curry injured his left ankle in the final minutes of the Golden State Warriors victory over Washington on Saturday night and is considered day to day.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, Fox 5
